data.body: 1fdc final gap: completion-verifier required scenario B repair in the AC's prescribed A-FIRST order (A --repair-snapshots, push; then B fsck --repair). Reworked scenario B to A-first (byte-equal convergence oracle + UUID-in-both retained), test green, pushed as change 625. Added CI-attestation comment. 8/9 tickets closed-signed (only 1fdc left, pending 625 land). Then close 1fdc + epic.
